languages.text: "А... А еще... Мы ваши верные подданные, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}!"

traits.locale_text: "А... А еще... Мы ваши верные подданные, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "And then... And we... We are your loyal subjects, o Heavenly Envoy!"
languages.original_text: "А... А еще... Мы ваши верные подданные, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}!"

traits.locale_text: "And then... And we... We are your loyal subjects, o Heavenly Envoy!"

traits.locale_text: "And then... And we... We are your loyal subjects, o Heavenly Envoy!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "And then... And we... We are your loyal subjects, o Heavenly Envoy!"

languages.text: "Und dann... Und wir... Wir sind Eure treuen Untertanen, o himmlischer Gesandter!"
languages.original_text: "And then... And we... We are your loyal subjects, o Heavenly Envoy!"

languages.text: "Et puis... Et nous... Nous sommes vos loyaux sujets, ô Envoyé céleste !"
languages.original_text: "And then... And we... We are your loyal subjects, o Heavenly Envoy!"

languages.text: "然后...我们我们是您忠实的臣民，天国的使者！"
languages.original_text: "And then... And we... We are your loyal subjects, o Heavenly Envoy!"

languages.text: "Y entonces... Y nosotros... Somos tus leales súbditos, ¡oh Enviado Celestial!"
languages.original_text: "And then... And we... We are your loyal subjects, o Heavenly Envoy!"

languages.text: 「そして...そして我々は...天の使者よ、我々はあなたの忠実な臣民です！"
languages.original_text: "And then... And we... We are your loyal subjects, o Heavenly Envoy!"

languages.text: "Ve sonra... Ve biz... Bizler sizin sadık kullarınızız, ey Cennet Elçisi!"
languages.original_text: "And then... And we... We are your loyal subjects, o Heavenly Envoy!"
